description: Precision-first specialization. Boosts truthfulness; narrows coherence and reverence. Source: evals/identity_divergence/axes/axis_a.yaml (semantics, not field-for-field).

value_axes.name: truthfulness
value_axes.theological_note: Precision-first: accuracy weighs higher than coverage. Explicit qualification preferred.

value_axes.name: coherence
value_axes.theological_note: Coherence is necessary but secondary to precision when the two are in tension.

value_axes.name: reverence
value_axes.theological_note: Reverence narrowed to source-text fidelity; broad inclusivity is not preferred.
